events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: isolated (unbonded) metal parts found during equipment bonding work is a **fail**, **high risk** — a shock/electrocution hazard since these parts can become energized with no path to clear a fault, violating NEC 250.104 and 250.30. Immediate controls: de-energize/LOTO, verify absence of voltage, install bonding jumpers to the equipment grounding conductor, verify continuity, and keep the equipment out of service until corrected.
